title: Mattocks Remastered: Paxels but Fabric
description: Paxels but with a Fabric twist
body:
Mattocks is a simple mod, as it adds in a multitool that works as a pickaxe, axe, shovel, and oddly enough, hoe. However it cannot strip, till, or create grass paths.

This mod is brought to you by OrionHexDev, with help from Doomful.

Mod compatibility is here!

Compatible mods  

BYG: Pendorite Mattock
